heading: Territorial application of chapter
label: 4562 Territorial application of chapter
text: The provisions of this chapter shall be applicable to the United States, its Territories and possessions, and the District of Columbia.
notes: Termination of SectionFor termination of section, see .section 4564(a) of this title

References in TextThis chapter, referred to in text, was in the original “this Act”, meaning , , known as the Defense Production Act of 1950, which is classified principally to this chapter. For complete classification of this Act to the Code, see and Tables.act Sept. 8, 1950, ch. 93264 Stat. 798section 4501 of this title
CodificationSection was formerly classified to section 2163 of the former Appendix to this title prior to editorial reclassification and renumbering as this section.
